race.comment: STOMP'EM (6) ran a much better race last time when sat on speed and fought on well to finish runner-up. Has the blinkers added. Will go forward and looks hard to beat again. GALAXY GENERAL (2) led throughout to score an effortless win last time. Has a wide draw but good early burn and will take catching g again this line-up. SASS (10) is much better than the last run. Placed fresh then disappointed last time when she got way too far back. Well worth another chance. RAMPAZETTO (4) has been thereabouts without winning lately, finishing fourth last time behind Daniher. Should be winding up late. RHESUS (3) is fitter and on the good second-up record can improve sharply.
